titleStmt.title: SII 18.244: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 244. CHAUḌADĀNPUR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Muktēs11vara temple.

summary.p: This composite record containing five grants made on different dates states that these grants were recorded on stone by Guttarasa of the Gutta family in the 3rd year of the reign of Vīra-Mahādēvarāya, Dundubhi, Vaiśākha śu. 15, Monday, lunar eclipse. The date is irregular. In Vaiśākha, s11u. 15 did not fall on Monday nor did an eclipse occur. The given tithi corresponds to A.D. 1262, May 5, Friday.

The donee of all the grants was Śivadēva the saint of Muktishētra who is stated to have entered Muktikshētra at the command of his guru Śiva-Muddudēva. The date of this event is given as Śaka 1148, Pārthiva, Bhādrapada śu. 15, Monday, lunar eclipse. The Śaka year quoted is the current year. The details correspond to A.D. 1225, August 19, Monday on which day the tithi commenced at ·81 though the eclipse occurred on the following Tuesday.

The first of the records states that on a former occasion Hiriya-Jōyidēva had, at the instance of Maṇan1chi-Nāyaka, the Paramaviśvāsi of Tribhuvanamalladēva, made a gift of some lands to S11ivadēva and had it recorded on a copper plate. The second grant gives the details of the land purchased by Śivadēva from the Mahājanas of Gōpe and Kuṛuvatti and it is dated in Kālayukta, Kārtika śu. 8, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1258, November 4, Monday f.d.t. ·27. The month was Nija-Kārtika. Another grant is dated in Śubhakṛit, Pushya śu • • • • • in the reign of Simghaṇa (apparently Yādava Siṁghaṇa). Further details are lost. During the reign of Siṁghaṇa, the year Śubhakṛit coincided with A.D. 1242-43. The remaining three grants are stated to have been made by Guttarasa. Of these, only one is dated and that is in Siddhārthi Chaitra ba. 15, Monday, solar eclipse in the reign of Kanharadēva (apparently of the Yādava family). The date is irregular. In the year Siddhārthi during the reign of Yādava Kannara, ba. 15 fell on Monday in Adhika-Chaitra corresponding to A.D. 1259, March 24, f.d.t. ·82. But there was no solar eclipse.
The record gives the genealogy of Guttarasa and says that Āhavāditya Vikramāditya (Vikramāditya II) had three sons, Gutta, Jōyi and Vikrama.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . namaḥstuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śabdādayōpi gṛhyaṁtē kriyaṁtē vacanādayaḥ . Avilaṁghyā hi sarvvē
ṣāmājñā śambhōrggarīyasī . svastiśrī jayamaṁgaḷapradamahādēvaś®tibrātadiṁ prastutyaprabhu su
stirāyuvanakhaṁḍānandasaṁprītiyaṁ vastustōmamanudughakīrttiyanudāraiśvaryya maṁ śauryyamaṁ
vistīrṇnāvanimaṁḍaḷakkanudinaṁ kūrttīge muktīśvaranu . svasti samastasurāsura kirīṭakōṭikhacitamaṇimarīcirōcidhāma
virājitacaraṇaṁ Aciṁtyaguṇābharaṇaṁ . Anaṁtabrahmāṁḍaṣaṇḍanivāsanijabhavanaṁ . Icchā mātrakṛtacaturddaśabhuvanaṁ .
rugyajuḥsāmātharvvavēdavēdārtthasmrutipurāṇadharmmaśāstrōpagīyamānaśubhacaritaṁ . nijaśaktikaḷāmaṁtravimōhita
līlācaritaṁ . pramathagaṇamanaḥsarōjarājahaṁsaṁ . samuttuṁgajaṭājūṭavibhūṣita caṁdrakaḷāvataṁsaṁ . śripārvvatī
vadanarājamitraṁ . śaraṇāgatatāpatritayaraudravidrāvaṇakāruṇyachchatranappa śrīmanmahā dēvaṁ dibyasiṁhāsanārū
ḍhanāgi pārvvatīsahitamire naṁdi naṁdinātha vīrabhadra bhadrakāḷa mahākāḷa bhriṁgīśa pramukhāsaṁkhyātagaṇaṁgaḷiṁ saṁsēvyamā
nanāgi śrīkayiḷāsadalli vaḍḍōlagaṁgoṭṭu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdidda suprasthāva samayadoḷu Ā Umāmahēśvaraṁ ga
ṇaṁgaḷige prasaṁnanāgi yiṁteṁdaṁ . Ide nālkuṁ vēdapāraṁ baga(ge)vaḍe diṭadiṁ sarvvaśāstrārtthapāraṁ padapiṁ smrutyartthapāraṁ tribhuvanabhuva
najñānavijñānapāraṁ . sadvākyārtthaikapāraṁ praṇavasamuditaṁ dhyānabhāvaikapāraṁ viḍitaṁ śrīrjyōtiliṁgāmaragaṇakaruṇōtpaṁnabhaktipra
sādavu . Ene kēḷdadrije biṁnapaṁ śiva jagakkī mārggamantōṟabēḷkenalandā prabhu nandināthana mogennōḍalke śrīsaṁgamēśana putraṁ
basavayya baṁkanadaṟiṁ śivamuddudēvaṁ janakkanimittaṁ śivadēvanāgiyu gaṇaśrīpāda mantōṟuveṁ . va . Ādeṁteṁdaḍe . kaṁ . Avana
takaṁdhararāgiye divijarśivarātrimāḍidā tatvadadoḷ dhavaḷēśvarākhyaliṁgadoḷaviraḷa śivamuddudēvamunipatiyippanu . A
byaktaśaṁkarananatisubyaktaṁ māḍi tōrppenenutī jagadoḷ . dibyadhavaḷēśaliṁgavanabyaya śivamuddumunivaraṁ bhāvisuvanu . śiva mudduThe letter va is written in cursive form above the line.
bratipatigī divijēṁdrapadagaḷeṁbavēṁ pāsaṭiyā bhavane kalikālakaluṣava tavisuva nevadiṁda mūrttiyantāḷdirddanu . kēśavajina
bauddhādigaḷīśana kiṁkararu bēṟe dēvateyalleṁdā śivamuddubratipa mahēśananolidāli sidaṁ jagatrayavaṟiyalu . Ama
ragaṇacaraṇakōmaḷavimaḷadaḷōtchullakamaḷayugaḷaparāga (.) pramuditamanadvirēphōpa meyiṁ śavamuddudēvamunipatiyippaṁ
. va . Anantaravu śrīgirinivāsanājñeyiṁ baṁda vīrabratiyaṁ nōḍi . v® . havaṇisabārada grajakulōdbhavanāgi vidhātraniṁ
da saṁbhavisida nālku sruṣṭiyoḷu puṭṭidaneṁbaḍe jāyatēstiyeṁbavu modalāda ṣaḍḍi kṛtiyoḷsale kūḍidanalli bhāvi
salbhavanolavinda vīraśivadēvagaṇēśvaranāgi tōṟidan . va . Endu tannoḷparibhāvisi yiṁ tendaṁ . suranadiye tuṁga
bhadrāvaranadi surasamiti vipragaṇanikaravu Ā suragiri mahēśabhavanavu dhareyoḷkaviḷāśavenipa muktikṣētravu .
Ā muktikṣētradoḷirddī maimeya meṟeyabēkenuta guru nuḍiyal . svāmi mukutēśane paraṁdhāma śrījyōtineṁdola
vindaṁ . va . śakavarṣa 1148 neya pārtthivasaṁvatsarada bhādrapada śuddha 15 sōmavāra caṁdrōparāga puṇyati
dhiya madhyāhna samayadoḷu baṁdu muktikṣētramaṁ pokku . kaṁ . viracisidaṁ kaiḷāsada caritramaṁ vīrabhadrana śrī
padamaṁ(.)smarisuta vīrabratamaṁ dharisidanatuḷabaḷavikramaṁ śivanu . sīmeyanullaṁgisadude nēmaṁ dharegoṟagadippuReadghi
de sale niyamavu . kāmisadippude nēmaṁ svāmi mahādēvanittaḍolade nēmaṁ . Adaṟaṭida bhūtaṁgaḷa bedaṟisi benaRead nna
ṭṭikuṭṭidaṁ bhairavanaṁ . kedaṟuvabeṁtaradeyvavanodedaṁ vīrēśanātmajaṁ śivadēvanu . māridoṟeyāgi liṁgada sārevaraṁ ba
ralu tuṁgabhadreya paḍahō sārentu jaṟidu nūkida vīragaṇaṁgaḷa kumāranī śiva dēvanū . śivapadamaneydu
vaḍe mārggavideyenuttakhiḷajagakke tōṟuva nevadindaviraḷavāgire nalaviṁ śivakaṭṭeya kaṭṭi tōṟidaṁ śivadēvanu .
havaṇisalaridenisuva śivakaviḷāsavanakhiḷadēvatāpadasahitībhuvanakke tandu śivasukhabhavanada nevadindaracisidaṁ śivadēvaṁ
. trayiyaṁ nelegoḷsidavoltriyaṁgadiṁ mūṟu bhavanama nilisidavoltrayibhuvanikeyiṁ rudrapriyabhavanavanolidu
māḍisida śivadēvanu . Ākaḷaśāṁtaṁ bare mūlōkavaṟiye jīrṇnavāda śivabhavanava mattākaḷasaṁbare śileyiṁ lōkōttamavāgi mā
ḍisida śivadēvanū . śivadēvabratīṁdrasya liṁgārccanakaḷālavaṁ . Aciṁtyaṁ sarvva śāstrādyairanaupamyamagōcaraṁ . Aḷakhkhaḷakhkhayirū
drēkaḷaddha diḍhabhakti bhāvasaṁpannō (.) kaḷibaḷakuḷaṇimmahaṇōbaḷa sagguṇasāyi rō bhavōkhkhu śivadēvō . Āṟuṁ darśanamaṁ
sale mīṟi meṟeva śivagaṇājñāciṁtāmaṇi kayi sāre śivadēvamunipati tōṟi meṟada liṁgajaṁgame kyakramavaṁ . mattaṁ purāta
nara caritramanativicitramāgi liṁgārccanaṁgeyvutamireyire © svasti śrīmatu yādavarāyanārāyaṇaṁ bhu
jabaḷapratāpacakravartti śrīvīramahādēvarāya vijayarājyōdayada3ṟaneya duṁdubhisaṁvatsarada vayiśā
kha suddha 15 sōmavāra sōmagrahaṇadalli © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara . U
jjayinīpuravarādhīśvara vaṭakalpavṛkṣalāṁchita (.) vijayadhvajaṁ . bhuvanarakṣaṇaika dakṣadakṣiṇabhujaṁ caṁdragu
ptānvaya(ṁ)sudhārṇnavapūrṇnacaṁdraṁ . vibhavāmarēṁdraṁ haracaraṇanakhakiraṇa sāndracandrikācakōraṁ . śrī gu
rupadapayōdhara(ṁ) dhyānānaṁditamayūraṁ . māninīmānasarvvasvasūṟekāraṁ raṇadoḷu nīṟaṁ maṁ
ḍaḷikabhayiravaṁ . Ānaṁditayuvatīnayana kayiravaṁ paṁnnirbbaragaṁḍaṁ samaraśauṁḍaṁsaraṇa(ṇā)gatavajrapaThena is written above the line.
ṁjaraṁ Āhavādityaṁ . vīravikramādityaṁ . Ātaṁganunayadiṁ saṁjātargguta jō yyavikramāditya rvvikhyātarnnijabhujavijaRead tta.jō is written above the line.
yōpētarppaṁneraḍu maṁḍaḷīkara gaṁḍaru . Ā vikramaṁga maiḷaladēvigavudisida kumārakaṁṭhīrava mattā vikramānujātaṁ śrī
guttaṁ nijabhujaikavikramanādaṁ . Antāguttanṛpana viśāḷavakṣasthaḷadoḷanavarataṁ siri nijabhujāsidhāreyoḷu vija
yaśrīyolidippudaṟeṁ vīravitaraṇatyāgabhōgaṁgeyvuttaṁ nijarājadhāni gutta voḷala nelavīḍinoḷsukharājyaṁge
yvutirddu śrīśivadēvara kāruṇyamaṁ paḍedu śrīsōmanāthaliṁgalabdhavara prasādanāgirddavasaradoḷu manōtsāhadiṁ barasida
śāsanakramaventeṁdaḍe . muṁna hiriyajōyidēvarsaru cikkakurvvattinagrahāra māḍuvaṁ du śrītribhuvanamalladēvana paramaviśvāsi maṇaṁThe letters ḍuvam are written above the line in smaller characters.
cināyakana prēraṇeyiṁ Āgāmi yakṣīṇi sahita tāṁbraśāsanadalli baresi kuḷava kaḍidu kalla naṭṭu sarvvanamasyaṁ māḍi śivadēvara śiva
kāryyakārādhisida vrutti 2 kaṁ . mane 2 tuḍike 2 maḷava 2 keḍahugeya haḷḷadiṁ mūḍalu Ēkasthaḻadali Ere mattaru Eṁṭu . mattaṁ
kāḷayuktasaṁvatsarada kārttika suddha 8 sōmavāradaṁdu śrīśivadēvaru gōpe kuṟuvattiya pratigṛhasthara kayyalu krayaṁgoṁ
ḍ�kṣētra gōpeyalli Ālakoḷaniṁ mūḍalu Ere (.) mattaru 4 ka 50 cikkakuṟuvattiyali hiriyakereyiṁ teṁka heḍahuge haḷḷadiṁ
mūḍalu Ere mattaru 3 kaṁ 50 . gōpeyalli mane 2 tuḍike 3 Iṁtivayidakkaṁ Ā(a)śēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu Artthava koṁḍu kuḷava ka
ḍidu kala naṭṭu sarvvanamasyaṁ māḍi śivadēvarige Ārādhaneya māḍidaru . mattaṁ śrī śivadēvaru Ā mahājanaṁgaḷa kayyalu
krayaṁgoṁḍa sthaḷavivara . gōpeyali baṁni yoḷage hoṁnavattige hōda naḍuvaṇa dāriyiṁ tenkalere mattaru 1 kaṁ 50 baṁ
niyiṁ teṁkalere kaṁba 60 . Aliṁ mūḍa makki kaṁba 50 . hoṁnavattiyiṁ baṁda dēviya dāriyiṁ mūḍa keṁgāḍu kaṁba 50 bellavattade
re ma 1 dāriyiṁ baḍagalere kaṁba 60 . kuṟuvatiyalli koṁḍageṟeyiṁ teṁka prathama sthaḷa dalli kaṁba 60 . Ālakoḷaniṁ mūḍale
re ma 1 kaṁ 70 Āntu mattaru 7 gōpe mane 2 kuṟuvattiyalli mattarū nālvattaṟahā ḍadali yere kaṁba 85 mūḍa mānyabhūmiyali ma
ttaru 2 gōpeya koṁṭa baṁniyere kaṁba 50 Āntu mattaru 3 kaṁ 35 mane gōpeyalli 1 kuṟuvattiyali mane 2 Āntu mattaru 10 kaṁ
ba 35 mane 5 ṟa kuḷava kaḍivadake śrīguttarsadēvanu Āśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷige Artthava koṭṭu kuḷava kaḍisi kalla naṭṭu sarvvanamasyaṁ mā
ḍi śrīśivadēvarige Ārādhisidanu mattaṁ beḷuvoḷada bomagavuḍana kaya krayaṁgoṁḍa keyya sthaḷa baḍagavolanali tanna
baḷiyiṁ paḍuvalere mattaru ḷa baḍaga ma ḷa Āntu mattareṁṭu mane 1 maṁ Eṁdeṁduṁ sarvvabādheparihāraṁ māḍi makaḷu makkaḷu
de salisuva bā yiṁ kuḷava kaḍadu kalla naṭṭu bboṁmagavuḍa śivadēvarige Ārādhisi guttarsadēvanārādhisidanu .
ḷala keyi ma 8 mane 1 kuṟuvattiya keyi ma 2 kaṁ 85 mane 2 gōpeyalli keyi kaṁ 50 śivadēvaru basava
ṇya māḍikoṭṭa vṛtti . mattaṁ siṅghaṇavarṣa śubhakrutsaṁvatsarada puṣya su dēvara Therada are written above the line.
vattiyaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷu koṁge tiṁgaḷiṁge hāgavo
Ā baḍiyiṁdāda ga 15 vaṁ Ā śivadēvaru māḍuva liṁgajaṁgamā
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyaṁ jāyatē krimiḥ maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
© śrīkanharadēvarṣada siddhārtthisaṁvatsarada caitra bahuḷa 15 sō sūryya grahaṇada samayadalli cavuḍiseṭṭiyara karaṇada nāgarsana taṁma bhānudēvanu koṭṭa tōṭa gaddeya keḷageOn the curved portion at
gaṁgana kaṁba 5 Ā staḷadali jōgiseṭṭi koṭṭa tōṭa kaṁba 5 mattaṁ guttarsa dēvanu koṭṭa tōṭa kaṁba 6 Adayisaṟa kuḷava kaḍidu kalla naṭṭu sarvvanamasyaṁmāḍi śrī
śivadēvarige guttarsadēvaneyārādhisidanu . muṁna hoṁna boṁmiseṭṭiyaru śivadēvarige Ārādhisida gadde ma [Ā]ru paḍuvalu hūdōṭa kaṁba 5
hoṁnavattiyalli gōpeya dāriyiṁ baḍagalu gaṁgana kaṁba 5 .

yī śāsanamaṁ pēḷdu ba
rasi guttavoḷala
ṇaṁgaḷu
Digital edition of SII 18.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
